title: Neisosperma musculiformis

The plant is native to Australia, and its classification is based on its morphology and genetic characteristics. Neisosperma musculiformis belongs to the genus Neisosperma, which consists of a few species native to Australia. The classification of Neisosperma musculiformis is further supported by its unique characteristics and features that distinguish it from other species in the family Loganiaceae.
